title: Interim CDC guidance for polio vaccination for travel to and from countries affected by wild poliovirus.
summary: Public health guidance and vaccine recommendations for travelers to countries with wild poliovirus (WPV) circulation, including specific schedules for infants and children.
key_findings: CDC and WHO provide updated vaccination requirements for travelers to polio-endemic or affected countries.
Infants and children in the US should receive 4 doses of IPV.
